title: BitPay secures Dutch licensing under MiCA, plans to expand stablecoin payments
summary: BitPay secures Dutch licensing under MiCA, plans to expand stablecoin payments
briefing: The Dutch Authority for the Financial Markets approved BitPay’s application as a crypto-asset service provider under the Markets in Crypto-Assets requirements.

title: Bitcoin price dips on US stocks sell-off as Micron losses pass 30%
summary: Bitcoin price dips on US stocks sell-off as Micron losses pass 30%
briefing: Bitcoin fell 1.5% from local highs amid a reversal in US stocks as markets moved from bullish US inflation cues to retail profit-taking.

title: Ethics in crypto market structure ‘really not our concern,’ says Blockchain Association CEO
summary: Ethics in crypto market structure ‘really not our concern,’ says Blockchain Association CEO
briefing: A former CFTC commissioner urged lawmakers not to “kill all the hard work that we put in the rest of the bill” by making ethics a make-or-break issue on crypto market structure.

title: Morgan Stanley’s E*TRADE launches spot crypto trading through Zero Hash
summary: Morgan Stanley’s E*TRADE launches spot crypto trading through Zero Hash
briefing: Eligible E*TRADE retail clients can now buy, sell and hold Bitcoin, Ether and Solana through a partnership with crypto infrastructure provider Zero Hash.

title: Tradable’s $1B Stellar deal adds to institutional tokenization boom
summary: Tradable’s $1B Stellar deal adds to institutional tokenization boom
briefing: Tradable will bring up to $1 billion in private credit assets to Stellar, extending the blockchain’s push into institutional finance and tokenized real-world assets.

title: Alpaca raises $135M to fund tokenized agent-first infrastructure
summary: Alpaca raises $135M to fund tokenized agent-first infrastructure
briefing: The BNP-backed brokerage infrastructure provider is expanding into tokenized markets and AI-native financial services as both DeFi and TradFi companies pursue onchain business.

title: Gambling on random Pokémon cards: Onchain gagcha hits record high as crypto sinks
summary: Gambling on random Pokémon cards: Onchain gagcha hits record high as crypto sinks
briefing: Users spent a record $324 million on onchain gacha in June, even as Bitcoin hit a 21-month low. The thrill of scoring a top Pokemon card from a random pack is becoming big business

title: Prediction markets defy crypto downturn with record Q2 volume: CoinGecko
summary: Prediction markets defy crypto downturn with record Q2 volume: CoinGecko
briefing: Prediction markets reached a record $113.8 billion in notional volume in Q2 as spot CEX trading, derivatives volume and stablecoin market cap declined.

title: Bitcoin Q-Day Recovery Proposal Aims to Let Users Prove Ownership After Quantum Attack
summary: Bitcoin Q-Day Recovery Proposal Aims to Let Users Prove Ownership After Quantum Attack
briefing: Project Eleven says a new post-quantum cryptographic proof could help Bitcoin users recover wallets after Q-Day by verifying ownership.

title: Mira Murati Drops Her First AI Model After Leaving OpenAI—And It's Fully Open Source
summary: Mira Murati Drops Her First AI Model After Leaving OpenAI—And It's Fully Open Source
briefing: Mira Murati's Inkling won't dethrone the best Chinese open-weights models, but it gives Western developers something they haven't yet had.

title: Visa Unveils Stablecoin Platform for Banks and Fintech Companies
summary: Visa Unveils Stablecoin Platform for Banks and Fintech Companies
briefing: The Visa Stablecoin Platform will let financial institutions integrate stablecoin payments and treasury operations into Visa's existing network.

title: XRP Can't Keep Up as Bitcoin Takes a Breather: Analysis
summary: XRP Can't Keep Up as Bitcoin Takes a Breather: Analysis
briefing: The post-CPI rally gave XRP a nudge. The coin barely moved. Now the chart is filling in the picture.

title: Dormant Bitcoin Whale Moves $383 Million After More Than 8 Years
summary: Dormant Bitcoin Whale Moves $383 Million After More Than 8 Years
briefing: The wallet holding nearly 5,908 BTC since 2017 transferred its entire balance to a new address.

title: Morning Minute: Base Hands Its App Over to Cobie
summary: Morning Minute: Base Hands Its App Over to Cobie
briefing: Plus, Stripe makes a $53 billion move that could crown a stablecoin king. And Ostium gets drained of $18M in the latest DeFi exploit.

title: Feds Arrest Florida Man Over Video Game Malware That Stole $220K in Crypto
summary: Feds Arrest Florida Man Over Video Game Malware That Stole $220K in Crypto
briefing: Zyaire Wilkins allegedly procured malware hidden in video games that infected 8,000 devices and broke into 80 crypto wallets, the FBI says.

title: US Senate Unanimously Opposes Sam Bankman-Fried Pardon
summary: US Senate Unanimously Opposes Sam Bankman-Fried Pardon
briefing: The nonbinding resolution said the disgraced FTX founder should 'under no circumstances' receive clemency.
